title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 29 - 2017: 360 kilometer diameters in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on March 29, 2017, updating on a Google Earth mapping project where he lost hours of work to an unexpected computer crash. He also describes his ongoing research into libertarianism, listening to related books and interviews so he can critique the ideology, and notes that a libertarian video channel deleted his comments and removed his dislikes.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: studying it critically in order to tear it apart, not sympathetic to it
frustrated but calm — took a break and restarted rather than getting upset
sees it as validation that he is getting to them; treats it as a form of engagement

entities: June (author of book being listened to)
